episodes.title: Korean Funerals, Rain in Bloodhounds 2, and Cult Documentaries | Honey Jam Podcast
episodes.description:
Ep. 87: In today's quick episode, Jess shares a quick life update before we dive into what we’ve been watching lately, including Netflix’s Bloodhounds Season 2.

episodes.title: Ep. #15: White Chicks Impressions, Xanga Coder, and How We Almost Joined a Cult
episodes.description: Janice and Jessica are joined with Honey Jam's very own art director and designer, Jane Kim! Jane is a woman of many talents and we know you will fall in love with her charm too. 🍯💗 Hosted By Janice Jeong and Jessica Shin Follow Janice: ⁠⁠⁠ Instagram: haitsjanice⁠⁠⁠ TikTok: haitsjanice / jessocean Podcast Artwork by: Jane Kim

episodes.title: Ep. #8: Cults, Millennial Tings, and Icks
episodes.description: Janice and Jessica catch up on the latest Netflix cult documentary "Dancing for the Devil", talk about how OLD they are now, and look through "ick" submissions from the listeners. Follow along and listen to their “honey jam” stories every Tuesday! 🍯💗 Hosted By Janice Jeong and Jessica Shin Follow Janice: ⁠⁠⁠ Instagram: haitsjanice⁠⁠⁠ TikTok: haitsjanice / jessocean Podcast Artwork by: Jane Kim
